instruction:
Write a complete testthat test file for `flextable::use_flextable_qmd`.

Package: flextable v0.9.12.004
Description: Functions for Tabular Reporting
Function: use_flextable_qmd
Parameters: path, quiet
Test patterns used: test_that
Expectations used: expect_true

Function Code:
```r
use_flextable_qmd <- function(path = ".", quiet = FALSE) {
  src <- system.file(
    "_extensions", "flextable-qmd",
    package = "flextable",
    mustWork = TRUE
  )
  dest <- file.path(path, "_extensions", "flextable-qmd")
  if (!dir.exists(dirname(dest))) {
    dir.create(dirname(dest), recursive = TRUE)
  }
  if (dir.exists(dest)) {
    unlink(dest, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  file.copy(src, dirname(dest), recursive = TRUE)
  if (!quiet) {
    message(
      "Installed flextable-qmd extension in ", dest, ".\n",
      "Add `filters: [flextable-qmd]` to your document YAML."
    )
  }
  invisible(dest)
}
```

Requirements:
1. Use test_that() blocks with descriptive names that reference `use_flextable_qmd`
2. Test basic functionality using appropriate expectations (expect_true)
3. Test edge cases: NULL input, empty strings, missing arguments
4. Test error conditions with expect_error()
5. Each test_that() block should test one logical behavior
